title: Shinjuku to screen Revival of Evangelion
display_title: Shinjuku to screen Revival of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Shinjuku to screen Revival of Evangelion             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Dec 25, 2014 1:08 am tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Looks like there's going to be a screening of Revival of Evangelion in Shinjuku tomorrow at 5:00 PM, Japan time. No word yet on whether or not it's the HD master, but considering that the NGE run on Hulu was pre- master, this is likely to be as well.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Dec 25, 2014 7:20 am I wonder if the (in)famous hospital scene will be amputated like last time?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Dec 25, 2014 12:25 pm They can just screen one of the many film prints no problem. No need for digital. EDIT: Facebook post confirms it: （フィルム上映）

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Dec 25, 2014 1:01 pm New tweet from @evangelion_co-- it looks like they'll be screening Revival for another five days.

Article: Shinjuku to screen Revival of Evangelion
[]: Shinjuku to screen Revival of Evangelion             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Dec 25, 2014 1:08 am tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Looks like there's going to be a screening of Revival of Evangelion in Shinjuku tomorrow at 5:00 PM, Japan time. No word yet on whether or not it's the HD master, but considering that the NGE run on Hulu was pre- master, this is likely to be as well.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Dec 25, 2014 7:20 am I wonder if the (in)famous hospital scene will be amputated like last time?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Dec 25, 2014 12:25 pm They can just screen one of the many film prints no problem. No need for digital. EDIT: Facebook post confirms it: （フィルム上映）

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Dec 25, 2014 1:01 pm New tweet from @evangelion_co-- it looks like they'll be screening Revival for another five days.
